raw_consumer_statement:
I reported my XXXX  credit card stolen on or about XX/XX/year>. All charges made on XX/XX/XXXX and thereafter were not authorized by me. I cancelled my card, but XXXX transferred the fraudulent charges to my new card. XXXX  demands {$440.00} and refused my disputes stating " We have completed our fraud investigation based on the information available. Since you participated in the transaction with the merchant by providing them with your card, we have determined that your card was not used fraudulently. 
As a result, we have re-billed your account and consider this matter resolved. '' I was not present, nor did I participate in any way with these fraudulent transactions. My card was stolen, and I am reporting this to law enforcement.
